Help & Support

Request counseling services or provide feedback

Crisis Support

If you're in crisis or experiencing thoughts of self-harm, please call the National Suicide Prevention Lifeline at 988 or your local emergency services immediately.

Request Counseling

Book a session with a professional counselor

Share Feedback

Help us improve your experience

Contact Information

Other ways to reach us

Phone Support

1-800-MINDCARE

Email Support

support@mentrahub.com

Counseling Center

Student Wellness Building, Room 201

Book Counseling Session

Fill in your preferences and we'll get back to you

Request Submitted

Thank you for requesting a counseling session. A counselor will contact you within 24-48 hours to confirm your appointment.

You'll receive a confirmation email at your registered email address.

Feedback Submitted

Thank you for sharing your feedback! Your input helps us improve our services and better support students like you.

Share Your Feedback

Help us improve your experience

🆘 Need Immediate Help?

If you're in crisis or need immediate support, please reach out:

24-hour crisis support

+603-7956 8145
💬

Talian Kasih

Social welfare helpline

15999

Campus Counseling

Remember: You are not alone. Help is always available.
